format.title: Vibrant and clear session title
learningOutcomes: Primary goals of this specific session

messages.content: Return only valid JSON that matches the requested schema. Do not include markdown or explanations.

Create a high-level lesson plan outline dividing the following material into EXACTLY 5 sessions, each of 45 minutes.
    Subject: Science
    Grade/Level: IX / 9, 10 / IX and X
    Academic Term / Units Selected: Term 1 - Whole Term
    Specific chapters / topic focus: ["Matter in Our Surroundings","Is Matter Around Us Pure","Atoms and Molecules","Cell - Basic Unit of life"]
    
    Return a structured JSON list of the sessions containing the session number, titles, and target learning outcomes which fits the overall scope. This will serve as the roadmap.

Return valid JSON only. Match this target schema shape exactly:
[
  {
    "id": "unique-id",
    "sessionNumber": 1,
    "title": "Vibrant and clear session title",
    "duration": 45,
    "learningOutcomes": [
      "Primary goals of this specific session"
    ]
  }
]
